title: Pouring Station
description: A calm real-world pouring practice coach: gather cups, pour slowly, and clean up any spills as part of the work.
learningGoals: Practice careful hand control while pouring
Follow a short spoken sequence of practical-life steps
Build independence with setup and cleanup
Treat spills gently as part of the work
interactionModel: tap the large done button after each real-world pouring step; timed steps coach slow, careful movement
feedbackModel: spoken coaching with sparkle/tick/tada SFX; praise focuses on care and cleanup, not perfect results
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
